title: Décor Double Wall Stainless Steel Travel Mug - Keeps 4 Hours Hot - 12 Hours Cold - Car Cup Holder Compatible - Removable Screw Top Lid - 300ml Black
features: KEEPS DRINKS HOT FOR 4 HOURS: The Decor 300ml Travel Mug keeps your drinks hot for 4 hours and cold for 12 hours. Made with vacuum insulated stainless steel for superior thermal performance and designed to keep your coffee, tea, hot chocolate, herbal teas etc with that perfect fresh made taste.

LIGHTWEIGHT AND STYLISH- Our 300ml Travel Mug has a slimline design is a convenient size for car cup holders, desks and a great on the go travel mug. The black colour has a beautiful gloss finish and is a great accessory to any outfit or occasion. Also available in Rose Gold, White and Graphite.
SCREW TOP AIRTIGHT LID - you can be sure to avoid spillages while on the go. Our Travel Mug range is dual purpose for hot and cold use, making this the ideal all day re-usable drinking option.

DÉCOR have over 60 years market experience of providing leading food storage, hydration and lunch solutions that are not only functional, exceptional value for money but also at the heart of our consumers needs.
